title: Scope open-PR blockers to claimed repositories
goal: Keep Bureau's fail-closed open-PR and task-binding guards while ensuring a PR blocks only its own repository or the explicitly claimed repositories of its bound task, never unrelated repository balls.

acceptance.assertion: An open PR with missing, invalid or conflicting Bureau task binding blocks new write work in that PR's repository.
An unbound or invalid PR in one repository does not block unrelated repositories.
A valid task that explicitly claims multiple repositories blocks conflicting writes only across those claimed repositories.
what-now, repo-balls, conflicts and live-conflicts project the same repository-scoped blocker semantics.
The live state with Grabowski PRs #140/#145 and Lenskit PR #956 no longer produces unrelated Bureau, Cabinet, Chronik or Steuerboard blockers while same-repo blockers remain visible.

metadata.live_finding: Open PR blockers from Grabowski and Lenskit were projected onto unrelated repositories by live-conflicts.
